calendar.matters:
Petition To Determine Title And Require Transfer Of Property To Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Peter Meyers for Robert Hoffman.

Mr. Meyers stated that he does not think Mr. Hoffman drafted the Trust documents and that he thinks it was the Notary Mr. Guerrero. The Court noted that there is no opposition. The Court granted the Petition to Determine Title and Require Transfer of Property to Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
